data.content_ref: inline:{"tour":["0","2","6","8","13","3","1","4","7","11","9","12","10","5"],"rationale":"Atypical ordering: immediate 0-2 jump (large dx) to seed north-west chain 6,8,13,3 then south chain 1,4,7,11,9,12,10,5.
